name: Gym Masters
author: Poki
description: Gym Masters is a simulator game where your goal is to become the strongest person in the gym! Start with push-ups to boost your strength, then punch the boxing bag to earn coins as rewards. Use your hard-earned coins to buy energy drinks, recover your stamina, and keep training harder. Unlock all kinds of gym equipment and push your limits to dominate the gym floor. Are you ready to flex your skills and become the ultimate Gym Master? How to play Gym Masters? Move with WASD, arrow keys, mouse or the joystick! Who created Gym Masters? Gym Masters is created by Lampogolovii. Play their other games on Poki: Crafty Anvil , Day of Meat , Day of Meat: Castle and Day of Meat: Radiation ! How can I play Gym Masters for free? You can play Gym Masters for free on Poki. Can I play Gym Masters on mobile devices and desktop? Gym Masters can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
